reviews.review_description:
I'm kicking myself for leaving this as one of the last exercise apps i got.  i have the full collection of rhythm games, boxing games, general exercise apps, etc etc.  i added this because i was missing on certain body strength exercises like Pilates.  i think other games underestimate the extra drive it gives you to have a trainer that's easy on the eyes.  the trainer should be designable, and this one gives you just enough (a little more would be even better).  i expected xrcise or dance Eden or even thrill of the fight to be more like this, as it is easy enough to do.  but other apps all fall this.  i would buy more apps by this producer if they can handle dance, boxing, sports, etc. 

suggestions:  the activities are a little strangely organized.  why separate one routine from all the others at front?  it's not the most useful one.  in the main list, order them by how active they are.  maybe give better descriptions.  it's kind of a mess figuring out which ones are the best for my remaining energy each night, or in the morning.  more variety by length of time.  and maybe more difficulty also, if i want to do more strength say.  also the left scroll and right scroll are interested if what i find intuitive.  give us an option to flip that please.

developer_response.body:
Love this review. Thank you! Especially considered all the apps you already owe and tested.. wow. (for dance, boxing, sports -> please check out the app Train Together!)

Really glad ReCharge surprised you in a good way, and also glad you noticed the value of having a trainer who actually feels motivating to spend time with. That absolutely matters more than some apps seem to realize.

Your suggestions are good too. The activity organization, clearer descriptions, more variety in length and difficulty, and an option to flip the scroll direction all make sense. Very useful feedback.

And good to hear you’d try more apps from us. We appreciate that, a lot!

reviews.review_description:
Two thoughts for improvements:

1. Add sliders for body type changes for more body positive feel, eg, dad/mom bod types for the trainers.
2. AI interaction so you can talk while working out to keep interest.

developer_response.body:
Thanks, and honestly, both of those are very good suggestions! 

Because funny enough, that is pretty much -=exactly=- where our app 'Train Together' is going. Our May content pack, The Comeback, adds more relatable dad/mom-bod trainer types (not present now, but will be in May!), and that app already has the kind of AI interaction you’re asking for too. It is all built around that AI even actually. 

So you’re definitely not wrong, you may just be looking for something closer to Train Together. If you want us to hook you up with a free trial, let me know! (please contact us through our website verseus-games.com for this)

reviews.review_title: Just what I was looking for
reviews.review_description:
When searching online for any information about this fitness app there was barely anything to be found. After finding some videos in someone’s top five fitness apps for MQ3, I decided to buy it.

A good range and different levels of activities. Some of that will make you sweat if you really go for it. One of those fitness apps that does not make me feel bad when I’m struggling/lagging behind.

One of the things this fitness app gets right it’s not needing to be connected online, which is great for battery both internal and external.

developer_response.body:
Thanks, really nice to read this.

Glad the mix of workouts works for you, and also glad it feels encouraging instead of punishing. That matters a lot to us. And yes, being able to use it offline is a big plus.

Appreciate you giving it a shot.

reviews.review_description:
Please can you include the environments from them nature retreat series on the world of dance game in this one. I feel like this will be a perfect combination of the relaxing yoga and relaxing environments. There are six of the environments and world of dance, unfortunately this game only seems to have one. If you could combine the six environments into this game it would be fabulous.

Lovely game, maybe needs longer sessions and more environments.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your review and for enjoying ReCharge. It’s great to hear you like the mix of relaxing yoga and calming environments.

Just to clarify; ReCharge already includes a (very) wide variety of environments. You can switch them in the menu. Some players miss that option at first, so it’s worth having another look. (we may make this even more clear in future updates, perhaps)

xFIT does indeed have a different set of environments, including more outdoor ones, which might be what you were thinking of. If that's what you mean, let us know (email, webform on our website, our discord) -> perhaps we'll add a couple of fresh ones to ReCharge!

reviews.review_description:
Thanks for listening to your users and for considering my feedback. I look forward to the new release goh described. 

Apps like Recharge that support strength, flexibility, mobility, cognition, and the mind–body connection are the ones people return to again and again. Building a strong relationship between developer and user is key for continuous improvement and adoption.

There are many apps in this space, but I believe Recharge is on the right track to becoming one of the best.

—————-

Great app and many thanks to the developers for implementing  MR.  It has been a game changer. 
Consider developing an app to teach Tai Chi - yang style!

My wish list for Recharge

- enable players to increase the lengths of sessions. 
- make transitions from exercise to exercise smoother so that players can easily follow the instructor 
- make the eyes of the instructors following the headset so they look more alive
- add AI to the instructor dialogue, so that he/she doesn’t always repeat the same words  and sentences. May. Be you can use it to make the sessions more interactive in the future. 

Thanks again. 

- M.   


Great app for mindful stretches and isometric postures. I hope the developers will add MR soon as following the trainer can be a bit challenging without seeing your surrounding. 
I hope also the developers will add AI to the trainer at some point in a near future to enable a more intelligent dialogue

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much for the 5-star review for ReCharge too (I just saw your review for xFIT too) and for your thoughtful suggestions. We’re really glad to hear that ReCharge continues to motivate you (it's one of our favourites!), and that Mixed Reality has been such a game changer.

You mentioned some great ideas. Instructor eyes already move at times (not constantly, since that would feel unnatural), and we’ll keep looking at how to make transitions smoother and sessions feel more natural. Session length is also a point we’ve heard from other users, and we’re exploring ways to give players more flexibility / clarity there.

We also love your note about Tai Chi - that’s exactly the kind of feedback that shapes where we go with future projects. Our newer app, xFIT, is where we’re focusing most of the big new features like AI-driven interactivity (to be launched within a month, finally!) and deeper customization, so if you enjoy ReCharge, you’ll likely love what’s coming there too.

Thanks again for the encouragement. Reviews like your 5 stars are what make it possible for us to keep improving across all our apps.

reviews.review_description: I missed the bundle sale the last time it was offered,  and I can say I'm glad I caught it this time to buy the complete set with the addition of DLC. I've been impressed since I played the first time. The hardest part is trying to fill my calorie burn rings on all workout apps. Even after I complete my workouts for the day, I'm still thinking about it and looking forward to the next time I work out. I like how engaged each workout keeps you, and going through a full workout is challenging. The personal trainers are the cherry on top, making me feel as if I'm working out with a real trainer. Their upbeat personality helps with seeing a workout through. No major issues, and the problems can be easily overlooked, which I'm sure will be fixed in future updates. I give all apps a 10/10. I'm hoping these projects will continue to be developed on, improved, and updated with new content for many years! I also recommended to everyone I know looking for ways to get in shape!

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the support and the 10/10 across the board; means a lot to us.
We're definitely committed to keeping this going, improving with every update, and bringing in new content for a long time to come.
Really glad you're part of that journey!

reviews.review_description:
1. The trainer is not rotating.  It means the trainer is in only one direction.  You have to turn your head or come out of your posture to even see the trainer 
2. No pause between posture change. The trainer instantly start the next posture while we are still coming out of previous posture 
3. Trainer is too close.  Literally 1 foot away. Can't change position . I tried in setting but don't see any. 
4. I don't think the app is tracking you during workout . No feed back nothing.
 
Pl take care of above.

developer_response.body:
Really appreciate the 5 stars and feedback - only this kind of support (5 stars) give us the possibility to keep improving.

1. You can rotate the trainer using the thumbstick, though repositioning all around the room them isn’t possible yet. Like a real coach, they stay put. If you have suggestions on how to improve, please visit our Discord channel; would love to hear more. 

2. There is transition time, but you're right that we should communicate this more clearly in the game. (transition time isn't counted for the performance / motion tracking for example).

3. The distance setting is (in the latest Update) at the bottom of the settings menu under "Distance to Trainer". Good to know - we noticed it isn't strong enough, so we'll address that in our next coming update asap!

4. We do track performance in ReCharge, but keep it light on purpose. The trainer’s voice gives subtle cues if you're doing fine or slacking; but if you’d like more direct feedback, we can definitely look at adding that. If possible, please reach out to us by either email or discord (through our website verseus-games.com ) and we'll put it on our list no problem.

Thanks again, and glad to hear you enjoy ReCharge!

reviews.review_title: Worked great but now it's not
reviews.review_description: When I originally got the bundle this worked great as a warmup/cool down but now I can't get it to load at all. It starts shows the name then just white sphere and doesn't load

developer_response.body:
We saw your message and already sent you a reply by email, so hopefully we can get things up and running again soon.
If you haven’t seen it yet, check your spam just in case. Looking forward to getting you back into those warmups fast!!

reviews.review_description: Great app to improve my mobility and core workouts. One suggestion -- could you please add a female voice option to the meditation sessions? Better yet, if the trainers led the meditation voiceover, that would improve immersion big time. Otherwise, solid app, a keeper for sure.

developer_response.body:
Really appreciate the 5 stars, thanks so much!

We added the meditation feature to see if it would resonate, and feedback like yours really helps with that.

It’s clear now that more voice options, especially female ones, would be a great addition. We're also looking into expanding with more guided sessions in upcoming updates.

Thanks again for taking the time to share your thoughts and for supporting what we're building. 🙏🧘‍♀️

reviews.review_description: This is a nice fitness app mostly for stretching exercises. The library of exercises is a bit limited and so are the lines the trainers deliver. Also all female trainers have the same voice which is a bit weird. Since i guess the voices are AI it should have been easy to make them sound a bit different. I also miss an explanation of how the in-app currencies work. I still don't know how to earn these green emeralds. Customization options for the trainers are very nice though. I hope they are successful enough to add more content in the future.

developer_response.body:
Hey CrimsonJupiter,
I also strongly hope we are successful enough to add more content in the future - but getting 5 star reviews such as yours does really help, thanks!

The (English) female voice of ReCharge is not an AI voice (it's a real voice actress), but you're right we will be transitioning to AI in the coming months. This will allow for different voices, more languages, and also, eventually, more interesting dialogue. 

On the legacy green emeralds, these will be more clear in the coming, next update. (at the moment, you can only earn those through Achievements)

reviews.review_description:
I've been using this app every morning to stretch and meditate and really enjoy it. There are enough environments that it doesn't get stale, a few different trainers to choose from and the ability to customize their appearance, however the available stretching routines are minimal and there is only 1 meditation routine, I think there should be more, even if it came in the form of DLC I'd likely pay, but if that were the case I think the price of the app should be less to reflect.

What I'd really like is the ability to create a custom stretching routine using the stretches that are already available and to be able to adjust the duration of each position. Another suggestion would be to have a web browser / YouTube player whilst in the environments so I could use meditation/stretching routines from YouTube.

If the above suggestions were implemented I think it'd be worth the price. I got the app on sale and I think for the sale price it was fair but wouldn't have paid full price for the current available stretching/meditation routines.

Love the app and think it has huge potential and hope it gets more improvements

developer_response.body:
Hi ChickenBagel.
Reviews and 5-star ratings like yours give us the opportunity to improve further, thanks! 

We'll  take your feedback and ideas into account, although perhaps it's also good to know there are already at least 40 different stretching routines in there. If you can't find them in the menu, please let me know (as they unlock one by one).
 (or, reach out to us on the Verseus Discord, or email / webform from our website) .

reviews.review_description: I’ve been trying out different wellness apps for a while, including TRIPP, but ReCharge XR really stands out for me. The AI trainer is surprisingly good at guiding you through the exercises, and the variety of routines like Qigong and yoga makes it easy to find something that fits my mood. What I love most is that I didn’t have to subscribe—it’s just a one-time fee, which I really appreciate. I’ve noticed my stress levels have gone down, and I’m sleeping better. Definitely a solid investment for anyone into wellness.

developer_response.body:
Hey PlayzVR95,
Thank you so much for the review and 5-star rating. I'm considering printing this review out and putting it on the wall for the team to see - this is EXACTLY why we're doing what we do!

reviews.review_description: There aren't many VR yoga apps, but this is one of my favorites. The trainers, locations, and moves all look and work so well, given that you're wearing a headset. My only wish is that they mixed reality so I can see myself in the mirror to check my form (which is probably quite bad)

developer_response.body: Mixed Reality is coming your way in 2 weeks max!

reviews.review_description:
Don’t get me wrong, I really like the personal trainer style!

But I see only very sameish trainings, that all more or less do the same.
There is not one real yoga program and neither is a meditation in here.
It’s all soft workout related, even the „before bed“ stuff has the same mives as all the other programs.
Seems broken.

developer_response.body: Meditation has been added recently! Let me know if this works for you, or if you would like to see even more workouts and variation :)

reviews.review_description: Awesome just awesome ! To begin , i tried a lot of sport apps , even tried training programs on youtube but nothing motivated me for long , this does ! It’s a great way to have fun and excercise at the same time . Great looking customizable trainers that show you exactly what to do . I would love to see some kind of chat intelligence integrated in the game for real conversations with the trainers , but the game allready get’s five stars from me , it’s allready great ! I’m going to buy the fitness edition also , great job from the creators well done !

developer_response.body: You're Awesome!  We'll be exploring chat AI in future updates but thanks for the feedback and support so far.

reviews.review_description: Played the other two games from this creator, they were good really good. I thought I'd try this one. Challenging but not as much action as I wanted, my conclusion is that different people play different games for a reason

reviews.review_title: Wellness and Yoga can be Fun
reviews.review_description:
Gameplay Video on my Youtube Channel

This is one of 3 Fitness games released by the same company at the same time. They all have the same look and trainers but work in different ways. you can setup the trainer how you want and unlock the more you play. Recharge is the Wellness app full of yoga, pilates and breathing exercises.

There is plenty here with different modes is you want just a chill workout cooldown.

Same at the others you can get different locations.

This game is a cool idea – a VR space for self-care and stress relief.  I loved the calming visuals and the guided breathing exercises. They definitely helped me unwind after a long day.  However, I found the movement sections a little too slow-paced for my taste. I would have liked some options for a more dynamic workout routine.

Overall, a nice chill experience, but it could be more well-rounded.

developer_response.body:
Hi Reneyoga,

We appreciate the review and detailed description. We are aiming for Recharge XR to be an app that showcases a slow, relaxing and soothing experience in VR.

If you are interested in a more fast pasted workout routine, feel free to check "Fitness One XR Evolved" in the Oculus Store.

reviews.review_description: Cool game
Dude, Recharge XR is like a virtual spa for your mind. Forget that power nap, this VR game is all about chilling in calming environments.
